title: HOOK
description:
Hook is a 2D fishing roguelike where every run is about Diving deeper, catching Special and odd fish, and making enough cash before each day ends. Upgrade your rod, buy weird items, chase bounties, collect new fish for your Aquarium, and survive the dangerous Creatures waiting below....

There’s more to Hook than simply dropping a line and selling fish. Every run gives you new ways to build your loadout, chase extra rewards, and survive the increasingly dangerous zones below the surface.

• Complete Bounties for bonus cash!

• Craft new Fish to sell!

• Encounter dangerous Bosses and enemy fish!

• Survive random Zone Events!

• Collect fish for your Aquarium!

• Open crates for randomized rewards!

• Gain EXP and choose temporary upgrades each level!

• Use powerful Special Abilities!

• Use over-the-top ULTIMATE Moves!

• Experiment with different items and builds every run!

Check the Bounty Board each day and hunt down the fish worth the most cash. Every day brings a fresh set of random targets, giving you extra reasons to explore deeper zones and take risks for a better haul.

• Track down 3 wanted fish each day!

• Earn extra cash for every completed bounty!

• Find targets hiding across different zones!

• Mark off wanted fish as you catch them!

• Clear the full board for a perfect bounty run!

Build up your loadout and use ridiculous Ultimate moves when a normal ability just isn’t enough. Each Ult has its own effects, animations, and powerful ability that can completely change the outcome of a Quota.

• Charge up and unleash over-the-top Ultimate Moves!

• Fire massive beams through multiple zones!

• Freeze entire sections of the ocean!

• Skip between dimensions and catch fish across different zones!

• Turn ordinary fish into valuable golden variants!

• Impact frames!
description_short: Hook is a 2D fishing roguelike where every run is about Diving deeper, catching Special and odd fish, and making enough cash before each day ends. Upgrade your rod, buy weird items, chase bounties, collect new fish for your Aquarium, and survive the dangerous Creatures waiting below....
